mapper.sql: id, name, avatar, bio, country, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM artist WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artist WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artist (name, avatar, bio, country) VALUES (#{name}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{country})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM artist a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.artist_id = a.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY a.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artist a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s WHERE s.artist_id = a.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE')

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.name, a.avatar, a.bio, a.country, a.created_time, a.updated_time FROM artist a LEFT JOIN song s ON s.artist_id = a.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s2 WHERE s2.artist_id = a.id AND s2.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM artist a LEFT JOIN song s ON s.artist_id = a.id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM song s2 WHERE s2.artist_id = a.id AND s2.status = 'ACTIVE')
